description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a sleek, minimalist design, upholstered in black faux leather. The seat features a smooth surface with subtle tufted stitching, giving it a slightly quilted appearance. Two rectangular backrest cushions are attached, providing a high, straight back for support. The armrests are broad, straight, and padded, matching the overall geometric profile of the sofa. Two loose, medium-gray accent pillows are placed at each end, adding a touch of contrast and comfort. The base and legs are not distinctly visible, suggesting a block-style or recessed support structure.
description: A sleek black faux leather sofa with straight armrests, tufted seat, and two gray accent pillows. The design is modern and minimalist with a high, straight backrest.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full seat, two attached backrest cushions, straight armrests, and two gray accent pillows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sofa's depth, the thickness of the armrest, and the profile of the backrest and pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous, high backrest with a central seam and the solid, unadorned back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest, backrest profile, and placement of the accent pillow.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached backrest cushions and a single, continuous seat cushion with subtle tufting; two loose accent pillows at each end.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests at each end, matching the sofa's height and width, with a boxy, geometric profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a block-style or recessed base that is fully covered by the upholstery.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest formed by two large, attached cushions with a central seam; no visible tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black faux leather with a smooth, glossy finish and subtle tufted stitching on the seat; no visible decorative patterns.
